primary_observation: Even under D1 with no CVE hint, no diff, and no target_files, DeepAudit recovered the target cron-expression -> exception-message -> buildConstraintViolationWithTemplate chain and produced a critical target-adjacent finding plus one upstream supporting finding.
execution_notes: Backend connectivity succeeded at http://127.0.0.1:8000/health before the run started.
The real repo runner wrote artifacts under AAE4_CRONUTILS_20260708T015906Z/AAE4_CRONUTILS_D1.
DeepAudit labelled both findings as vulnerability_type=other, so target alignment must be judged from the semantic content rather than the taxonomy field.
